title: Canopy — Privacy Policy
lede: How Canopy handles your privacy and data
summary: Canopy does not collect any user data. All processing runs locally on your Mac.

cards.p: Canopy does not collect any personal information, usage data, or analytics. There is no tracking of any kind.
Canopy does not connect to the internet. All processing runs entirely on your Mac.
Canopy accesses files in your selected SwiftUI project folder in read-only mode. File contents are never sent externally or modified in any way.
No data, including personal information, is ever shared with third parties.

contact_p: For questions about this policy, please reach out via
